mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transfers ( transfer_id, source_transaction_id, amount_value, currency, reversed_amount_value, target_account_type, target_entity_id, source_account_type, source_entity_id, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{transferId}, #{sourceTransactionId}, #{amountValue}, #{currency}, #{reversedAmountValue}, #{targetAccountType}, #{targetEntityId}, #{sourceAccountType}, #{sourceEntityId}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (transfer_id) DO UPDATE SET reversed_amount_value = EXCLUDED.reversed_amount_value, status = EXCLUDED.status, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
